analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises China’s contribution to UN peacekeeping since 1990, portraying Chinese peacekeepers as brave and bringing peace and hope to conflict areas. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) — Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Yes; it highlights China’s constructive international role in peacekeeping and helping conflict areas, fitting the benevolent, peace-promoting image. CH3 (epic history) — No; no historical adversity or CCP-led overcoming is discussed. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) — No; the focus is international actions, not domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — Not directly; it does not discuss domestic development, technological leadership, or governance success broadly. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) — No. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
